reviews_list.review_title: The college is awesome and the infrastructure and the staff is very supportive.

review_content.Placements: You have to pass in 12th with Science and your PCB group marks total is above 150 to get admission in Diploma and for B.Pharma you have to clear CET exam. review_content.Infrastructure: College provide you Wi-Fi, library, computer room and gathering hall to celebrates functions and days the hall and the ground for sports activities are very wide and clean. College provide hostel to the students who came studies from long distance.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college and college campus teaching is very helpful to study.

review_content.Placements: The percentage is a maximum of 80 to 90 percent. Nice staff to teaching and playing the many games in the college. Many celebrated on the college Ani campus are most beautiful to look at. This is the most beautiful college in the pharmacy.
